data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying the decision process for users leads to faster choices.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Ensures that clickable targets are appropriately sized and spaced.
data.technical_spec: Large, easy-to-click buttons for primary actions.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Utilizes familiar designs and interactions to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Short-term memory load is minimized by presenting information in chunks.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Optimizes key moments to ensure a memorable user experience.
